answers: Don't use cotton swabs inside ear, limit headphone volume, and protect from loud noise.
Ear Care tips: consult a professional for personalized advice. Don't self-diagnose or self-treat serious conditions.
Learn more about ear care from trusted medical sources. Always follow your doctor's advice.
